position_operator.name: Position Operator
position_operator.description: x_hat psi(x) = x * psi(x). In position representation, the position operator is simply multiplication by x.

angular_momentum_z_operator.description: L_z = -i hbar d/d(phi) in spherical coordinates.

hamiltonian_operator_1d.name: Hamiltonian Operator (1D)
hamiltonian_operator_1d.description: H_hat = T_hat + V_hat = -hbar^2/(2m) d^2/dx^2 + V(x). Total energy operator.
hamiltonian_operator_1d.search_text: Hamiltonian operator total energy kinetic plus potential generator time evolution Hermitian observable H hat spectrum eigenvalues

number_operator.name: Number Operator (Harmonic Oscillator)
number_operator.description: N = a_dagger * a, the number operator for the quantum harmonic oscillator. Eigenvalues are n = 0, 1, 2, ...
